○ pv-ana.1 · Example analyzed leaf bead   [● P3 · OPEN]
Owner: Stephen Howard · Type: task
Created: 2026-04-16 · Updated: 2026-04-16

DESCRIPTION
Add a cancel button to the event edit modal that discards unsaved changes after a confirmation dialog.

DESIGN
Introduce a new confirmation modal variant that re-uses the existing ModalDialog component. When the cancel button is clicked, if the form is dirty, show the confirmation; if confirmed, emit 'cancel' and close. Otherwise close immediately.

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA
- [ ] Cancel button visible in edit_event.vue modal footer
- [ ] Clicking cancel on a dirty form shows a confirmation

NOTES

# Implementation Context
Generated: 2026-04-16

## Files to Modify
- `src/client/components/calendar/edit_event.vue` (modify)
  Reason: Add cancel button to modal footer with click handler that checks dirty state.

## Relevant Tests
- `src/client/test/calendar/edit_event.spec.ts`

## Skills to Apply
- frontend-components
- frontend-modals

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Cancel button visible and wired to handler

## Estimated Complexity
small (20-30 min)

PARENT
  ↑ ○ pv-ana: (EPIC) Example parent ● P3
